title: Rotate Kubernetes API server certificate
outcome: Control plane uses renewed API server certificate before expiry.
facts: Certificate expiry impacts kubectl and component auth

steps.completion: API calls succeed without cert errors

title: Drain node for planned maintenance
outcome: Target node is cordoned and workloads evicted safely.
facts: DaemonSet pods are not evicted by default

title: Upgrade Kubernetes worker node image
outcome: Worker node runs approved image version with workloads healthy.
facts: Node image changes may require reboot

title: Apply PodDisruptionBudget for critical deployment
outcome: Critical deployment maintains minimum availability during disruptions.
facts: PDB constrains voluntary disruptions

steps.text: Define PDB with minAvailable or maxUnavailable

title: Enable metrics-server in cluster
outcome: Resource metrics available for autoscaling and kubectl top.
facts: HPA depends on resource metrics

title: Configure HorizontalPodAutoscaler for API service
outcome: API deployment scales automatically by CPU target.
facts: HPA requires resource requests set

steps.text: Define HPA min/max replicas and target metric

title: Rotate image pull secret for private registry
outcome: Workloads pull private images with new registry credentials.
facts: Old secret may be referenced by multiple service accounts

steps.text: Patch service accounts/deployments to reference updated secret
Restart sample workload and confirm pull success
steps.completion: Pods pull images without auth failures

title: Enforce namespace resource quotas
outcome: Namespace resource consumption is bounded by policy.
facts: ResourceQuota limits aggregate namespace usage

title: Migrate deployment to immutable image digest
outcome: Deployment references pinned image digest instead of mutable tag.
facts: Tags can drift; digests are immutable

steps.text: Update deployment image to digest reference

title: Enable audit logging for Kubernetes API requests
outcome: API audit logs are captured for security review.
facts: Audit policy controls verbosity and event scope

steps.completion: Audit policy is loaded by API server
Audit records include user and verb

title: Patch critical CVE in base container image
outcome: Workloads run patched image version with vulnerability remediated.
facts: Image patch requires build and rollout

steps.text: Update deployment to patched image digest
Confirm vulnerability scanner no longer flags CVE

title: Back up and restore etcd snapshot
outcome: etcd snapshot backup is valid and restore process verified.
facts: etcd is source of cluster state

steps.text: Run documented restore drill in non-prod

title: Restrict privileged pod admission
outcome: Privileged pod specs are denied by policy.
facts: Admission policies evaluate pod security context

steps.text: Define admission policy for privileged controls

steps.completion: Policy does not break approved workloads

title: Configure network policy for namespace isolation
outcome: Namespace traffic paths are restricted to approved flows.
facts: Default allow remains unless policy is present

steps.text: Add allow rules for required services

title: Roll back failed deployment revision
outcome: Service restored by reverting to last known-good deployment.
facts: Deployment history stores revisions

steps.text: Inspect rollout history and failed revision
Validate service health and error rate

title: Enable Pod Security Standards enforcement
outcome: Namespaces enforce baseline/restricted pod security profiles.
facts: Pod Security labels control enforce/audit/warn modes

steps.text: Apply Pod Security labels to target namespaces
Deploy policy-compliant and non-compliant test pods
steps.completion: Non-compliant pod is blocked or warned

steps.text: Review admission events for enforcement evidence

title: Configure liveness and readiness probes for API pods
outcome: Pods self-heal and route traffic only when ready.
facts: Probe timeouts and thresholds affect restart behavior

steps.text: Define readiness and liveness probes in deployment

steps.completion: Unhealthy pods restart and traffic shifts correctly

title: Set node taints and workload tolerations
outcome: Specialized workloads schedule only on intended node pools.
facts: Taints repel pods unless tolerated

steps.completion: Pods land on intended nodes only

title: Enable cluster autoscaler for node groups
outcome: Node capacity scales automatically with pending workload demand.
facts: Autoscaler requires cloud provider integration and permissions

steps.text: Deploy cluster autoscaler with least-privilege IAM/RBAC
Trigger pending workload and observe scale-out
steps.completion: Node count increases to satisfy scheduling

title: Create periodic backup for persistent volume claims
outcome: PVC data backups run on schedule and are recoverable.
facts: Backup tooling differs by storage backend

steps.text: Define backup schedule and target storage

title: Limit Kubernetes API server anonymous access
outcome: Anonymous API requests are disabled or tightly restricted.
facts: Anonymous access increases attack surface

steps.text: Review current API server auth flags
Disable or restrict anonymous access per policy

title: Configure cert-manager issuer for TLS automation
outcome: Ingress certificates are issued and renewed automatically.
facts: Issuer type determines challenge flow
dependencies: DNS or HTTP challenge path configured

steps.text: Create ClusterIssuer with trusted CA/ACME config
Validate ingress serves valid TLS certificate
steps.completion: TLS handshake presents expected cert chain

title: Tune kubelet eviction thresholds for node stability
outcome: Node eviction behavior aligns with memory and disk pressure policy.
facts: Aggressive thresholds can cause avoidable pod churn

steps.text: Validate behavior during controlled pressure test

title: Enforce image registry allowlist via admission policy
outcome: Pods can only run images from approved registries.
facts: Admission policy can inspect image references

steps.text: Define allowlist policy for trusted registries
